case_title: KA LOK CHEUNG VS. KATHRYN MILLBURN

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, KA LOK AS TO DEFENDANT MILLBURN, KATHRYN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, KA LOK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLBURN, KATHRYN $3,045.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,205.00, DAMAGES ARE BASED ON CHIROPRACTOR BILLS, WHICH THE COURT FINDS REASONABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHEUNG, KA LOK AS TO DEFENDANT MILLBURN, KATHRYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
